name: dense dashboard
skips: web-animation-design unless motion is part of the brief
designPosture: dashboards are compositions, not card grids
qualityBar: clear primary vs secondary visual weight
tables and filters survive mobile with explicit decisions
sticky elements earn their space and actually work
the screen feels information-rich, not cramped
recommendedInputs: explicit mobile strategy for tables, sidebars, and sticky chrome
DESIGN.md or project identity notes with responsive stance
humanJudgmentRequired: what should remain simultaneously visible vs collapse on mobile
when a table should stay a table vs translate to cards or detail views
how much density the product can support before trust drops
promptFraming: build a dense but legible dashboard for comparison-heavy work
avoid generic admin templates and equal-weight cards
treat mobile as a deliberate translation problem, not a shrink pass
preserve analytical clarity over decorative polish

skillsSkipped: creative skills unless explicitly called for
humanJudgment: what must stay visible on mobile
